headline: B of A Securities Maintains Neutral on Principal Financial Group, Lowers Price Target to $92
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Joshua Shanker   maintains Principal Financial Group (NASDAQ:PFG) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $96 to $92.
